zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr於1460年7月23日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾艾藍德時，他的父親Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr30歲，母親Mrs. Ramsden25歲。他於1485年7月23日與Alice Bothemly在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1537年在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr于1460年7月23日出生在英国英格兰越可爾艾藍德时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr30岁，母亲Mrs. Ramsden25岁。他于1485年7月23日与Alice Bothemly在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1537年在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ramsden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Ramsden in Cartworth, near Holmfirth (Yorkshire), recorded as Rommesdene in 1315 and Ramesdene in 1323. The placename derives from Old English ramm ‘ram’ (genitive rammes) or hramsa ‘wild garlic’ + denu ‘valley’.

habitational name from Ramsden in Benenden (Kent). The placename probably derives from Old English ramm ‘ram’ (genitive rammes), or perhaps an Old English personal name Ramm (genitive Rammes), + Old English denn ‘pasture’.

variants.name: Ramson
meanings: habitational name, either from Ramshorn in Bickington (Devon) or from Rampisham (Dorset).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr was born on 23 July 1460, in Elland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr, was 30 and his mother, Mrs. Ramsden, was 25. He married Alice Bothemly on 23 July 1485, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1537, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr est né le 23 juillet 1460, à Elland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Ramsden, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice Bothemly le 23 juillet 1485, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1537, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr am 23. Juli 1460 in Elland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr 30 und seine Mutter Mrs. Ramsden 25. Er hat am 23. Juli 1485 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Alice Bothemly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1537 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr è nato il il 23 luglio 1460 nel Elland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Ramsden, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alice Bothemly il 23 luglio 1485, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1537, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Ramsden Jrが1460年7月23日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエランドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Ramsden Srは30歳，母Mrs. Ramsdenは25歳であった。1485年7月23日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドでAlice Bothemlyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1537年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr(이)가 1460년 7월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 엘랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Ramsden(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1485년 7월 23일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 Alice Bothemly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1537년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr nasceu em 23 de julho de 1460, em Elland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Ramsden, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Bothemly em 23 de julho de 1485, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1537, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr родился 23 июля 1460 г. в местности элланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Ramsden, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Bothemly 23 июля 1485 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1537 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Ramsden Jr nació el 23 de julio de 1460, en Elland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Thomas Ramsden Sr, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mrs. Ramsden, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Alice Bothemly el 23 de julio de 1485, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1537, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años.
